The Aethelred Cipher

Book One in The Architecture of Survival Series

A thriller where ancient codes hide modern catastrophes

Author: Randy Pellegrini

Genre: Thriller / Historical Mystery

Pages: 320 pages

ISBN: 979-8-9906789-0-1

Price: $4.99 (ebook) / $14.99 (paperback)

Publication Date: June 15, 2025

About the Book

When cryptographer Sarah Chen discovers a pattern hidden in a thousand-year-old Anglo-Saxon manuscript, she stumbles into a conspiracy that spans centuries. Fans of Dan Brown and Umberto Eco will love this genre-bending thriller that weaves medieval history with cutting-edge science.

The Aethelred Cipher is the first novel in The Architecture of Survival series, a trilogy that explores humanity's oldest survival networks and their terrifying relevance to modern biological threats.

Reader Reviews

"A masterfully crafted thriller that kept me turning pages until 3 AM. The blend of historical mystery and modern science is unlike anything I've read." — BookBub Reviewer

"If you liked The Da Vinci Code but wished it had real science, this is your book." — Amazon Reviewer

About the Author

Randy Pellegrini is a software engineer and writer based in the United States. The Aethelred Cipher is his debut novel, the first in a planned trilogy exploring the intersection of ancient history and modern science. When not writing, he builds AI-powered tools for indie authors.
